---
title: ""
pagetitle: "Gonzalo Llamosas"
page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<section class="hero-block">
  <div class="hero-text">
    <h1>Hi, I'm <span class="accent">Gonzalo</span>.</h1>

    <p class="hero-lead">
      I am <strong>Assistant Professor in Public Finance</strong> at the
      <a href="https://www.uma.es" target="_blank">University of Málaga</a>,
      accredited by ANECA as Associate Professor.
    </p>

    <p class="hero-lead">
      My research sits at the intersection of <strong>fiscal policy</strong>,
      <strong>behavioural economics</strong> and <strong>data</strong>, with growing
      attention to how artificial intelligence is reshaping the tax base of
      advanced economies.
    </p>

    <p class="hero-lead">
      I currently work on the effects of fiscal consolidation on public debt
      sustainability in the EU-27, on the design of financial-education policies,
      and on how human decisions interact with fiscal-policy outcomes. My recent
      work has appeared in the
      <em>Journal of Behavioral and Experimental Economics</em> (2025) and
      <em>Global Policy</em> (2020).
    </p>

    <p class="hero-lead">
      Outside academia, I host <a href="outlook-project.html"><strong>Outlook Project</strong></a>,
      a YouTube channel on economics, data and human decisions.
    </p>

    <div class="social-pills">
      <a class="social-pill" href="mailto:gonzalo.llamosas@uma.es"><i class="bi bi-envelope"></i> Email</a>
      <a class="social-pill" href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/gonzalo-llamosas-garcia/" target="_blank"><i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i> LinkedIn</a>
      <a class="social-pill" href="https://github.com/lgg18106" target="_blank"><i class="bi bi-github"></i> GitHub</a>
      <a class="social-pill" href="https://x.com/gonzalollamosas" target="_blank"><i class="bi bi-twitter-x"></i> X</a>
      <a class="social-pill" href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=O8gTD4AAAAAJ&hl=en" target="_blank">Scholar</a>
      <a class="social-pill" href="https://orcid.org/0000-0002-4407-2845" target="_blank">ORCID</a>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="hero-image">
    <img src="images/profile.jpg" alt="Gonzalo Llamosas">
  </div>
</section>
```

## Recent

- **April 2026** · Working paper *"Does Fiscal Consolidation Reduce Public Debt? Evidence from the EU-27"* submitted to *[journal]*.
- **2025** · Published *"What Works in Financial Education?"* in [*Journal of Behavioral and Experimental Economics*](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.socec.2025.102401) (Q1).
- **Coming soon** · Launching the [Outlook Project](outlook-project.qmd) YouTube channel on economics, data and human decisions.

## En español

> *Soy profesor ayudante doctor en Hacienda Pública en la Universidad de Málaga, acreditado por ANECA como profesor contratado doctor. Mi investigación combina política fiscal, economía conductual y datos, con atención creciente al impacto de la inteligencia artificial sobre la base fiscal de las economías avanzadas.*
